name: PAY_CHKLST_ANNOTATIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.CHECKLIST_ANNOTATION_ID, B.BASE_ANNOTATION_TXT, B.BASE_ANNOTATION_ID, B.BASE_CHECKLIST_ID, B.OWNER_ID, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, B.LEGISLATION_CODE, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TL.ANNOTATION_TEXT FROM PAY_CHKLST_ANNOTATIONS B, PAY_CHKLST_ANNOTATIONS_TL TL WHERE B.CHECKLIST_ANNOTATION_ID = TL.CHECKLIST_ANNOTATION_ID AND USERENV('LANG') = TL.LANGUAGE
